patch.value: Agent-UX output polish: unknown-option errors should suggest valid flags; list-closed projection too verbose; schema add-field help discoverability

From 2026-07-02 audit (Lane A, pm-kes3): (1) unknown-option errors do not list valid flags or a nearest-match suggestion, forcing an extra contracts round-trip (agents should never be blocked by wrong flags); (2) pm list-closed defaults to the full projection (verbose for agents; closed queries are usually triage scans); (3) pm schema add-field help is buried in the shared option list, hard to discover the field-definition flags.
